2603.24372.title: Improving Lean4 Autoformalization via Cycle Consistency Fine-tuning
2603.24372.paper_summary: Autoformalization - automatically translating natural language mathematical texts into formal proof language such as Lean4 - can help accelerate AI-assisted mathematical research, be it via proof verification or proof search. I fine-tune Qwen3.5-2B with LoRA for natural language to Lean4 formalization on FineLeanCorpus and consider three training regimes: supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with curriculum learning (difficulty 1 to 10), SFT without curriculum ordering, and reinforcement learning using group relative policy optimization (GRPO) with a cycle consistency reward. Cycle consistency measures how well the meaning of a statement is preserved through a NL to Lean4 to NL' loop, computed as cosine similarity of off-the-shelf sentence embeddings. On an unseen subset of FineLeanCorpus (FLC) and on PutnamBench, RL substantially outperforms both SFT variants (mean cycle consistency 0.669 vs. 0.513 on FLC; 0.561 vs. 0.422 on PutnamBench), while increasing cross-entropy loss by only 0.011 nats, with minimal impact on formalization quality. Curriculum ordering provides no measurable benefit over shuffled training.
2603.24372.paper_summary_zh: 自動形式化 - 自動將自然語言數學文本翻譯成正式證明語言，如 Lean4 - 可以幫助加速 AI 輔助的數學研究，無論是通過證明驗證還是證明搜索。我使用 LoRA 對 Qwen3.5-2B 進行微調，以實現自然語言到 Lean4 形式化，並考慮三種訓練模式：帶有課程學習的監督微調（難度 1 到 10）、不帶課程排序的監督微調，以及使用群體相對策略優化（GRPO）的強化學習，並設置循環一致性獎勵。循環一致性衡量一個陳述的意義在自然語言到 Lean4 再到自然語言' 的循環中保留得如何，計算方式為現成句子嵌入的餘弦相似度。在 FineLeanCorpus（FLC）的一個未見子集和 PutnamBench 上，強化學習在性能上顯著超過了兩種監督微調變體（FLC 上的平均循環一致性 0.669 對 0.513；PutnamBench 上的 0.561 對 0.422），同時交叉熵損失僅增加 0.011 nats，對形式化質量的影響最小。課程排序對隨機訓練沒有可測量的好處。
2603.24372.author: Arsen Shebzukhov et.al.
